name: dmx-console
description: In-browser DMX lighting console with Art-Net, cues, chases, and shape engine

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w packages/server" "npm run dev -w packages/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/server && npm run build -w packages/client
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w packages/server && npm run test -w packages/client
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w packages/shared && npm run test:coverage -w packages/server && npm run test:coverage -w packages/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w packages/server && npm run typecheck -w packages/client
